function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD before entering folders, and used canonical entity + project records.
function.outcome_justification: `10_entities/cast/nora.md` identifies NORA as a household assistant prototype. The relevant NORA-linked at-home projects are `40_projects/2026_03_26_hearthline/README.MD` and `40_projects/2026_03_26_house_mesh/README.MD`; both folders carry the canonical project start-date prefix `2026_03_26`, which converts to `2026-03-26`.
